page.title: Top Hen Party Yacht Activities in Marbella for 2026

data.meta_description: Discover the best Marbella hen party yacht activities for 2026. From jet ski add-ons to sunset cruises, book your 12-person charter from €749.
data.summary: Plan your 2026 hen party in Marbella with our guide to yacht activities, including jet ski add-ons, sunset cruises, and private charters from Puerto Banús. Our fleet offers boats for up to 12 guests with all-inclusive pricing.
key_facts: All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) include a free jet ski for 4-hour+ bookings from €4,719.
Most boats depart from Puerto Banús, with easy access to Cala del Faro and Cabopino.
Maximum capacity is 12 guests on most yachts; smaller groups can book the 5-person Speedboat.
All pricing is upfront with no hidden fees, and bookings are via WhatsApp.
Activities include swimming, jet skiing, sunbathing, and exploring the Costa del Sol coastline.
Ideal for groups wanting a private, all-inclusive experience without extra charges.

faq.q: What is included in a Marbella hen party yacht charter?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs, so you can relax and enjoy the day.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and decorations on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food, cake, and decorations. The crew can help with set-up, but please avoid anything that might damage the boat. We recommend keeping it simple to maximise your time on the water.

faq.q: How many people can join a hen party yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Most of our yachts accommodate up to 12 guests, which is perfect for a hen party. Smaller groups can book the Speedboat (5 guests) or Dubhe (5 guests). For larger parties, we can arrange multiple boats.

faq.q: Do you offer jet ski activities on hen party charters?
faq.a: Yes, jet skis are available on select boats. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) includes a free jet ski on bookings of 4 hours or more (from €4,719). You can also add a jet ski to other charters – just ask via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is the best time of day for a hen party yacht trip?
faq.a: Afternoon charters (e.g., 2–6 pm) are popular for sunbathing and swimming, while sunset cruises (6–9 pm) offer stunning views of the Marbella coastline. Both work well for hen parties; choose based on your group's vibe.

faq.q: Can we depart from a marina other than Puerto Banús?
faq.a: All our boats are based at Puerto Banús, which is the most convenient departure point for Marbella. The marina is easy to reach, with plenty of parking and nearby restaurants for pre- or post-charter drinks.

faq.q: How do we book a hen party yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Simply send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a booking link. Payment is secure, and we'll handle the rest.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on our booking day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule to a better day. The skipper's decision is final for safety, but we always aim to find a solution that works for your group.

data.body_html:
Planning a hen party in Marbella for 2026? A private yacht charter from Puerto Banús is one of the most memorable ways to celebrate. With all-inclusive pricing, a licensed skipper, and a range of activities from jet skiing to sunset cruising, you can focus on the fun. Here's everything you need to know about the best Marbella hen party yacht activities for your group of up to 12 guests.

Why Choose a Yacht for Your Hen Party in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline offers calm Mediterranean waters, hidden coves like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, and iconic views of La Concha mountain. A private yacht gives your group exclusive space to swim, sunbathe, and dance – without crowded beach clubs. All our charters include drinks, snacks, and insurance, so there are no surprises. Whether you want a 2-hour blast or an 8-hour luxury cruise, the choice is yours.

Top Hen Party Activities on the Water

  • Jet Skiing – On the Mangusta 80 (white or grey), a jet ski is included free for 4-hour+ bookings (from €4,719). Perfect for adrenaline rushes between sunbathing sessions.
  • Swimming & Snorkelling – Anchor off Cabopino or Estepona for a dip in crystal-clear water. We provide towels and safety equipment.
  • Sunset Cruises – Sail along the Golden Mile as the sun sets behind the Sierra Blanca. A 2-hour charter (from €749) is ideal for a pre-dinner celebration.
  • Music & Dancing – Most yachts have Bluetooth speakers; bring your own playlist. The 24m Mangusta 80 and Ferretti 94 have ample deck space for dancing.
  • Photo Moments – Puerto Banús, the Marbella Marina, and the coastline provide stunning backdrops for group photos.

Our Fleet for Hen Parties

We offer a range of boats departing from Puerto Banús. For a hen party, we recommend:

  • Tier A (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) – 12.5m, up to 11 guests, from €749/2h to €2,299/8h. All-inclusive with skipper, drinks, and snacks.
  • Tier B (Mangusta 80 in white or grey) – 24m, 12 guests, from €4,719 for 4 hours. Includes a free jet ski.
  • Other boats – The Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 guests) or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 guests) are available on request. Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing.

All boats include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. No hidden fees.

Sample Itineraries for 2026

DurationActivitiesCost (from)
2 hoursSunset cruise along Marbella coast, drinks, music€749
4 hoursSwim at Cala del Faro, jet ski (on Mangusta 80), lunch€2,299 (Tier A) / €4,719 (Mangusta 80)
8 hoursFull day: Cabopino, Estepona, lunch, jet ski, dancing€2,299 (Tier A) / from €4,719 (Mangusta 80)

What to Bring

We recommend swimwear, sunscreen, a change of clothes, and your own playlist. You can bring food, cake, and decorations – just avoid anything that could damage the boat. The crew will help set up. For sunset trips, a light jacket is useful.

Booking Your Hen Party Yacht

To book, send a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. All bookings are subject to weather – if conditions are unsafe, you'll get a full refund or reschedule. Start your booking here.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a Marbella hen party yacht charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs, so you can relax and enjoy the day.

Can we bring our own food and decorations on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food, cake, and decorations. The crew can help with set-up, but please avoid anything that might damage the boat. We recommend keeping it simple to maximise your time on the water.

How many people can join a hen party yacht in Marbella?

Most of our yachts accommodate up to 12 guests, which is perfect for a hen party. Smaller groups can book the Speedboat (5 guests) or Dubhe (5 guests). For larger parties, we can arrange multiple boats.

Do you offer jet ski activities on hen party charters?

Yes, jet skis are available on select boats. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) includes a free jet ski on bookings of 4 hours or more (from €4,719). You can also add a jet ski to other charters – just ask via WhatsApp.

What is the best time of day for a hen party yacht trip?

Afternoon charters (e.g., 2–6 pm) are popular for sunbathing and swimming, while sunset cruises (6–9 pm) offer stunning views of the Marbella coastline. Both work well for hen parties; choose based on your group's vibe.

Can we depart from a marina other than Puerto Banús?

All our boats are based at Puerto Banús, which is the most convenient departure point for Marbella. The marina is easy to reach, with plenty of parking and nearby restaurants for pre- or post-charter drinks.

How do we book a hen party yacht in Marbella?

Simply send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a booking link. Payment is secure, and we'll handle the rest.

What happens if the weather is bad on our booking day?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule to a better day. The skipper's decision is final for safety, but we always aim to find a solution that works for your group.
